videos.headline: Avery Johnson keeps it for a K-State touchdown
videos.description: Avery Johnson tucks it and finds the end zone to get Kansas State on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Avery Johnson keeps it for a K-State touchdown) 2024/9/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oklahoma State gets tricky for 77-yard flea-flicker TD
videos.description: Alan Bowman executes the flea-flicker to perfection and finds De'Zhaun Stribling for 77 yards to the house for a Cowboys touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Oklahoma State gets tricky for 77-yard flea-flicker TD) 2024/9/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Giddens' 37-yard run sets up a K-State touchdown
videos.description: DJ Giddens rips off a 37-yard run to set Garrett Oakley up for a touchdown catch.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Giddens' 37-yard run sets up a K-State touchdown) 2024/9/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Avery Johnson throws a 55-yard dart for a K-State TD
videos.description: Avery Johnson airs it out to a wide-open Jayce Brown for a 55-yard house Wildcats' call.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Avery Johnson throws a 55-yard dart for a K-State TD) 2024/9/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: DJ Giddens rips off a massive 66-yard TD run for K-State
videos.description: DJ Giddens finds the gap and turns on the jets for a 66-yard Kansas State touchdown run.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (DJ Giddens rips off a massive 66-yard TD run for K-State) 2024/9/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Avery Johnson channels Tim Tebow on jumping TD pass
videos.description: Avery Johnson fakes a QB draw before making a jumping TD pass to Will Anciaux to pad K-State's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Avery Johnson channels Tim Tebow on jumping TD pass) 2024/9/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alan Bowman chucks his second pick of the game
videos.description: Alan Bowman rainbows a prayer into the end zone, only for Jacob Parrish to come away with a K-State interception.

videos.headline: Avery Johnson somehow escapes for a K-State TD
videos.description: Avery Johnson somehow evades the pressure for his fifth total touchdown of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_OnePlay (Avery Johnson somehow escapes for a K-State TD) 2024/9/28 ESHEET
